# Getting Started

This page mixes headings, paragraphs, and code blocks.

## Installation

Install the package:

```bash
pip install example
```

## Usage

Here is a Python example with a title and line numbers:

```python title="main.py" linenums="1" hl_lines="2 3"
def greet(name: str) -> str:
    greeting = f"Hello, {name}!"
    return greeting

print(greet("world"))
```
